error.signature: Build command failed. Error while executing process cmake with arguments: CMake Error at CMakeLists.txt

verdict.summary: NDK/CMake native build failed. Missing NDK version, wrong CMake config, or native source errors.

dead_ends.action: Install the latest NDK version regardless of project requirements
dead_ends.why_fails: Projects often require a specific NDK version. Wrong version causes ABI and header incompatibilities.
Only helps with stale CMake cache. If NDK version or CMakeLists.txt is wrong, same error returns.

workarounds.action: Install the exact NDK version specified in build.gradle
workarounds.how: android { ndkVersion '25.2.9519653' }; install via SDK Manager > SDK Tools > NDK (Side by side)

workarounds.action: Verify CMakeLists.txt paths and target architectures
workarounds.how: Check CMakeLists.txt target_link_libraries and add_library paths; ensure source files exist

workarounds.action: Set specific ABI filters to reduce build targets
workarounds.how: android { defaultConfig { ndk { abiFilters 'arm64-v8a', 'x86_64' } } }  // skip armeabi-v7a if not needed
